title: Business Post India is Hiring: Warehouse Manager (Senior)

jsonLd.title: Business Post India is Hiring: Warehouse Manager (Senior)
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with Business Post India! We are hiring a Warehouse Manager for our Vadodara team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About Business Post India:
Business Post India is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Prepare MIS reports on delivery performance and SLA adherence
• Coordinate with customer service teams to resolve delivery issues
• Ensure proper handling, packaging, and labeling of goods
• Oversee end-to-end logistics operations for timely delivery
• Manage relationships with third-party logistics providers
• Coordinate with warehousing teams for inbound and outbound operations
• Manage a fleet of vehicles and coordinate with drivers

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Supply Chain Management
• Proficiency in Freight Forwarding
• Proficiency in KPI Monitoring
• Proficiency in SAP SCM
• Proficiency in ERP Systems
• Proficiency in INCOTERMS
• Proficiency in Inventory Management
• Proficiency in Data Analytics

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Professional development and training programs
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Flexible working hours
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Vadodara, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Business Post India!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
